vulnerabilities.description: No clear input sanitization in UserDTO conversion methods.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input validation and sanitization in DTO methods using a library like Zod or express-validator.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS origin is hardcoded, which could lead to issues when deploying to multiple environments or during development.
vulnerabilities.fix: Consider loading CORS origin values from environment variables and implementing a dynamic whitelist to accommodate different environments.
